description: 95 - 25-02-2025 - Emails between Peter Mandelson, Ailsa Terry (Private Secretary for Foreign Affairs, No.10) and others
text:
Affairs, No.10) and others

From: Ailsa Terry[Personal

Sent: Tue 25/02/2025 5:17:40 PM (UTC)

To: JCS

Ce: Peter Mandelson|Personal Nicholas
Alton[Personal
James Roscoe/Personal Morgan
McSweeneyiPersonal Ninjeri
Pandit/Personal Jonathan Powell[Personal
Matthew Doyle[Personal JES

Subject: RE: LIMDIS: HMA steer for PM/POTUS bilateral

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

Brilliant — thank you. Copying Morgan, Nin, NSA and Matthew.

| will put this on a box note for the PM so he has it with the pack tonight.
And of course looking forward to your advice on arrival! See you tomorrow.
Ailsa

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

From: JCS
Sent: 25 February 2025 15:11
To: Ailsa Terry
Cc: Peter Mandelson ; Nicholas Alton ; JCS ; James Roscoe
Subject: LIMDIS: HMA steer for PM/POTUS bilateral
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
Dear Ailsa,
Please see below the steer requested from HMA for the PM/POTUS bilateral.
BEGINS

ek

285

ENDS
Best wishes,
 | Chief of Staff to His Majesty’ s Ambassador | British Embassy 
Washington
3100 Massachusetts Avenue NW, Washington, DC 20008 | Tel: 
 | Mobile: 
 | Email: 
Follow us online: www.gov.uk/fcdo
This email is intended for the addressee(s) only: All messages sent and received by the Foreign, 
Commonwealth & Development Office may be monitored in line with relevant UK legislation
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
For latest news and information from Downing Street visit: http://www.gov.uk/number10
Follow Number 10 on X (Twitter): http://x.com/10DowningStreet
Help save paper - do you need to print this email?
This email and any files transmitted with it are intended solely for the use of the individual(s) to 
whom they are addressed. If you are not the intended recipient and have received this email in error, 
please notify the sender and delete the email.
This footnote also confirms that our email communications may be monitored to ensure the secure 
and effective operation of our systems and for other lawful purposes, and that this email has been 
swept for malware and viruses.
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
***
JCS
Personal
Personal
Personal
286


OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
For this announcement, the media were briefed in London BEFORE any messaging script was 
actually completed and agreed. 
Get Outlook for iOS
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
From: James Roscoe 
Sent: Tuesday, June 10, 2025 10:41:05 AM
To: Ailsa Terry (No.10) 
 Peter Mandelson 
Cc: Caroline Hurndall 
 Jonathan Powell 
 Rob Dixon (Cabinet Oﬃce) (Sensi[ve) 
; Rich Morris (No.10)
Subject: 
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
Thanks Ailsa (and Rob),
We did not see the detail or the framing ahead of the announcement in advance. If we had, we would 
have pushed much harder to avoid the impression that 
The ask is for us to see announcements and scrips in advance so we can advise how it will land here
parsing_notes: Extract structured email headers (From, To, Cc, Subject, Date/Sent) for each message in the chain. Identify reply/forward nesting depth. Parse each message body separately. Redacted addresses appear as 'PERSONAL' — names are retained. Build sender→recipient edges per message for communication graph.
